snippets.title: FastAPI CRUD
snippets.description: FastAPI CRUD endpoints with Pydantic validation
snippets.code:
from fastapi import FastAPI
from pydantic import BaseModel
app = FastAPI()
class Item(BaseModel):
    name: str
    price: float
items = []
@app.post('/items')
async def create(item: Item):
    items.append(item)
    return item

snippets.title: Docker Compose Node + Mongo
snippets.description: Docker Compose setup for Node.js and MongoDB
snippets.code:
version: '3.8'
services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - '3000:3000'
    environment:
      - MONGODB_URI=mongodb://mongo:27017/app
    depends_on:
      - mongo
  mongo:
    image: mongo:7
    volumes:
      - mongo-data:/data/db
volumes:
  mongo-data:
